choices.text: PSBT (Partially Signed Bitcoin Transaction): create unsigned tx on online watch-only wallet → transfer PSBT via QR/SD card to air-gapped hardware wallet → sign offline → bring back signed PSBT → broadcast. Funds never touch online machine.

Watch-only wallet: createwallet "monitor" true + import xpub descriptor. Node tracks all derived addresses; shows balances + receives; cannot spend (no private keys). Sign separately on hardware wallet via PSBT.
